---
title: "Ljubica Georgievska"
toc: false
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<img src="files/profile.jpg" alt="Ljubica Georgievska" style="width:100%; max-width:280px; border-radius:6px;" onerror="this.style.display='none'"/>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}

<!-- BIO-START (managed by the robot: edit _inbox/bio.txt instead) -->
Welcome to my academic webpage!

I am a Visiting Assistant Professor at NYU Stern School of Business and an
Assistant Professor at BI Norwegian Business School. I completed my Ph.D.
in Finance from UCLA Anderson School of Management in September 2022.
<!-- BIO-END -->

## Research Interests

Empirical asset pricing, international finance, derivatives,
macro-finance, and financial intermediation.

:::

:::

## Contact Details

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .contact-block}
Department of Finance<br>
Leonard N. Stern School of Business<br>
44 West Fourth Street | New York 10012 | USA<br>
Email: [lg4086@nyu.edu](mailto:lg4086@nyu.edu)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .contact-block}
Department of Finance<br>
BI Norwegian Business School<br>
Nydalsveien 37 | Oslo 0484 | Norway<br>
Email: [ljubica.georgievska@bi.no](mailto:ljubica.georgievska@bi.no)
:::

:::

<div class="gratitude">
Gratitudes to Tsafitanos for the web design
</div>

<!-- Invisible structured data telling search engines and AI tools who this
     page belongs to. To add your ORCID later, put its full address (e.g.
     https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000) as another line in "sameAs". -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Ljubica Georgievska",
  "url": "https://ljubicageorgievska.github.io/webpage",
  "jobTitle": "Assistant Professor of Finance",
  "affiliation": [
    {"@type": "Organization", "name": "NYU Stern School of Business"},
    {"@type": "Organization", "name": "BI Norwegian Business School"}
  ],
  "alumniOf": {"@type": "Organization",
               "name": "UCLA Anderson School of Management"},
  "knowsAbout": ["Empirical asset pricing", "International finance",
                 "Derivatives", "Macro-finance", "Financial intermediation"],
  "sameAs": [
    "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=VOG7pkkAAAAJ&hl=en"
  ]
}
</script>
